kept.text:
Coreweave out with a statement on OAI. We sent headlines to @TheTerminal earlier

"OpenAI is a terrific partner, but not our only one. Our business is supported by a diverse and expanding set of customers like Meta Platforms, Anthropic, Microsoft, Google, IBM, Perplexity AI, Jane Street, and many others. As more companies build and deploy AI, demand for compute continues to grow. We continue to see demand exceed supply across the AI ecosystem, particularly as inference scales." - CoreWeave Spokesperson

2- Perplexity AI

Chaque réponse est sourcée, citée et vérifiable. 

Demandes vocales ou textuelles. 

Le moteur de recherche du futur. https://t.co/VygIyiVqqr

kept.text:
Most people waste time switching between tools.

Smart people build an AI stack.

Here are 21 AI tools you can use for almost anything:

• Writing → ChatGPT, Notion AI

• Research → Perplexity AI

• Coding → DeepSeek, Mistral AI

• Images → Midjourney, Leonardo AI

• Video → Runway ML, Google Veo

• Automation → Zapier

• Marketing → HubSpot, Jasper AI

• AI Agents → Intercom

You don’t need all 21.

Pick 3–5 tools and master them.

That’s how you actually get results.

AI is not about using more tools.

It’s about using the right ones together.

Save this for later.

Follow  @VKewat31841  me for simple AI systems that actually work

kept.text:
Fast facts on Serval and the experiment 👀

▪️Founded in 2024 by Verkada alums @jakeserval and @aMcleodIO 
▪️Valued at $1B by investors including @btrenchard at @firstround, @Redpoint, @sequoia 
▪️Customers include @NotionHQ, @perplexity_ai, @togethercompute, @vercel, @FOXCorp 
▪️Serval Start cohort size: 12 future founders (8 spots still available) 
▪️Overseen by @ChristneKim (recently joined from @GreylockVC)
▪️Accelerated equity vesting cliff of 6 months (2 year stint expected)
▪️Start's FDEs get thrown at Serval's biggest, toughest accounts and gain access to its VCs and execs on extra time
▪️Dual ambition to grow Serval and launch new startups

“This is the program that I wish existed when I was leaving college," says CEO @jakeserval.

kept.text:
Building for @AnimocaMinds while running my Etsy shop & side projects is hectic 🤯
 
I was doing market research → create listing optimised for search → create @instagram content & post by myself with @perplexity_ai, @GeminiApp, @openclaw but imagine if I can outsource this.
 
So I created the "Etsy Shop Strategist" skill for Minds to manage Etsy & IG end-to-end.
 
Results? 
 
IG ad drove 3.3k views → 106 clicks → 46 Etsy visits in hours, at just $0.08 CPV (1.4% conversion)!
 
 Minds is a versatile generalist, limited only by your imagination. Next up? A Cat Mind? 🐱
 
P.S. Check out my Etsy shop for magic NFC nails ✨💅
